subcodes.first_line: Share your time with God. Spend half of the day in search of livelihood, guaranteeing your material life and dignified appearance, and dedicate the other half in the acquisition of moral virtues and service at the threshold of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوقات خودت را با خدا تقسیم کن نصف روز را در تلاش معاش و تامین زندگی مادی و شئون ظاهری صرف کن
subcodes.subjects: @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @work as worship, @service to others; to the Cause of God
